saved.emptyBody: Find an ad under Jobs and select Save in the ad detail. It is saved here.
saved.openExternal: Open the ad on the external website

toggle.saveAria: Save the ad as a bookmark

chip.label: Saved ads
chip.empty: No saved ads yet. Open an ad and select Save in the modal.

recent.emptyBody: Run a search under Jobs. It is saved here automatically.
recent.hitsWithNew: {currentCount, number} hits, of which {newCount, number} new

chip.label: Recent searches
chip.empty: No recent searches yet. Search under Jobs and they are saved here.

actions.recentSearchNotFound: The search could not be found. It may already have been removed.
actions.recentSearchDeleteFailed: Could not remove the search. Try again.
actions.savedJobAdNotFound: The ad could not be found. It may have been removed.
actions.savedJobAdSaveFailed: Could not save the ad. Try again.
actions.savedJobAdRemoveFailed: Could not remove the bookmark. Try again.

tags.newAriaLabel: New job since your last visit

list.emptyBody: Adjust the filters or clear the search box to see more ads.

detail.appliedNotice: You have marked this ad as applied. See it in

match.heading: Match against your profile
match.noStatedOccupation: You have not stated which occupations you are searching within. Set this to see how well ads match your profile.
match.uploadCvFoot: Upload a CV to match on skills and requirements. It is required for a Strong match and a Top match.

notAssessedReason.ssykOverlap: You have not stated which occupations you are searching within.
notAssessedReason.titleSimilarity: No role in your CV to compare.
notAssessedReason.regionFit: You have not stated any region.
notAssessedReason.employmentFit: You have not stated any employment type.
notAssessedReason.skills: No skills could be read from your CV. Upload a CV under Profile.
notAssessedReason.default: This part could not be assessed.

mustHaveSummary.Match: You meet all the must-have requirements in the ad.
mustHaveSummary.Partial: You meet some of the ad's must-have requirements.
mustHaveSummary.NoMatch: You do not meet the ad's must-have requirements.
mustHaveSummary.Vacuous: The ad states no specific must-have requirements.

titleSummary.Match: Your role matches the ad's title.
titleSummary.Partial: Your role partly matches the ad's title.
titleSummary.NoMatch: Your title differs from the ad's.

gradeFilter.help: Filters the list by your match level. Uncheck a grade to hide it, or turn matching off entirely.

toolbar.matchSortDisclosure: Match sorting requires you to state which occupations you are searching within. The list is shown newest first until you have set this.

results.rateLimitedBody: You have made too many requests in a short time. Try again in {seconds} seconds.
results.errorBody: A technical error occurred. Try reloading the page in a moment.

heroSearch.fieldLabel: Search by occupation, employer or place
heroSearch.limitNotice: The search text is full (max {max} characters). Remove a tag to add more words.
heroSearch.help: Words become tags in the filter row at the results when you type a space or comma. Choose suggestions with the arrow keys and Tab.

heroFilters.showResults: Show {count, plural, one {{count, number} ad} other {{count, number} ads}}
heroFilters.ortEmpty: Regions could not be loaded right now. You can search by search terms anyway.
heroFilters.ortRightEmpty: Select a region on the left.
heroFilters.yrkeEmpty: Occupational areas could not be loaded right now. You can search by search terms anyway.
heroFilters.yrkeRightEmpty: Select an occupational area on the left.
heroFilters.klass2Empty: Filters could not be loaded right now. You can search by search terms anyway.

typeahead.rateLimited: Too many searches in a short time. Suggestions are paused for a while. You can keep typing and searching anyway.
